text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, you got one! Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize, but now that I look closely, it's
got perfect little chibi proportions, doesn't it? All
of them are so sweet.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? All of them are chibi style?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's good. That means my doll self doesn't need
to worry about being the odd one out!
